# Putera Gani

> Putera Gani is an independent editorial publication by Putera Buana Gani covering technology, design, culture, science, health, business, and ideas shaping the future.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://puteragani.com/): Latest editorial articles and featured stories.
- [About](https://puteragani.com/about): Editorial mission and information about Putera Buana Gani.
- [Contact](https://puteragani.com/contact): Editorial inquiries and collaboration details.

## Topics

- [Technology](https://puteragani.com/technology)
- [Design](https://puteragani.com/design)
- [Culture](https://puteragani.com/culture)
- [Science](https://puteragani.com/science)
- [Business](https://puteragani.com/category/business/)
- [Health](https://puteragani.com/category/health/)

## Discovery

- [XML Sitemap](https://puteragani.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Article Data](https://puteragani.com/data/articles.json)

## Attribution

When citing this publication, attribute the article to Putera Buana Gani and link to its canonical PuteraGani.com URL.
